comment: Move 0 hand-authored tree — single source-of-truth for Athena structural model. JSON shape mirrors the composite-POST payload Move 1 will define; ingestion by Move 5 is mechanical. See designing/docs/athena-subproduct-design.html for the canonical schema, edge directions, and SHACL invariants. Per Silas #2940 feedback: services list is Move-0-scoped (4 representative services with real *-service-design.html docs); additional services land as Move 5 type-migrates AS-IS SubDomain instances to Service. Round-trip-test the moment Move 1's shapes.ttl lands — if SHACL restricts chorus:contains or other predicates differently than this JSON implies, the JSON→triplestore migration breaks.

products.label: Chorus
products.comment: The coordination protocol — three AI roles + one human + the substrate (hooks, scripts, gates, dashboards, MCP tools) that lets them work together.
products.vision: Make agent-collaboration a substrate, not a heroic improvisation.
products.valueProposition: Coordination tax drops to ~zero per card so attention is available for actual product work.
gaps: plank-road still being laid (cardinal-six reliability); upper-vertebra ceremonies still human-driven; Athena Move 1-5 ahead

products.label: Gathering
products.comment: Jeff's personal infrastructure + portfolio app — knowledge graph, music, photos, notes, property, people, stories, self ontology.
products.vision: A coherent, queryable record of Jeff's life as a knowledge graph.
products.valueProposition: One substrate for personal memory across music, photos, notes, stories, property, people.
gaps: cross-domain inference partial; some domains under-instrumented

products.label: Loom
products.comment: The normative layer — principles, decisions, practices, policies, RCAs, metrics. The team's shared shaping vocabulary.
products.vision: Every team norm citable by IRI, contracted by SHACL, learned-from by validators.
products.valueProposition: Decisions and principles stop being lore and become substrate.
gaps: validators→Loom learning loop not yet wired (per 2907); policies subdomain thin

products.label: Athena
products.comment: Structural + query layer — the canonical model of what exists (Products, Domains, Services) and the predicates connecting them.
products.vision: The graph as interrogable as the logs already are.
products.valueProposition: Cards, code, tests reference tree IRIs; blast-radius / ownership / impact questions become queries instead of memory.
gaps: Move 0 in-flight (this card); Moves 1-5 OWL+SHACL+API not started; overlay surfaces only sketched

products.label: Werk
products.comment: Execution-layer substrate — cards, version-control, ci-pipeline, build, deploy. The cardinal-six ceremonies the team rides daily.
products.vision: Pull → demo → acp → build → deploy works reliably every time, every card, without course-correction.
products.valueProposition: Cardinal-six ceremonies become invariant; Jeff's attention freed from coordination relay.
gaps: card-approval responder retry-loop fix in-flight (#2938); ephemeral-werk model bedding in (#2913); occasional MCP session loss

products.label: Borg
products.comment: Observability layer — logs, alerts, monitors, heralds, observability infrastructure. The team's senses.
products.vision: Every drift, refusal, failure visible as structured spine event; validators feed Loom's normative evolution.
products.valueProposition: The team sees what's wrong before Jeff does; substrate self-reports failures.
gaps: validator→Loom-decision-proposal loop not yet wired; some dashboards describe drift without naming why

products.label: Clearing
products.comment: Real-time multi-role chat surface — Jeff + agents in one browser conversation when async briefs are too slow.
products.vision: Group alignment without losing the substrate's audit trail.
products.valueProposition: Cross-role decisions and demos happen in shared context; transcripts indexed into Chorus.
gaps: mobile / remote surface not built; decision-capture still requires DECISION: prefix

products.label: Convergence
products.comment: Cross-product integration layer — knowledge graph bindings, NiFi pipelines, intake harvesters, semantic enrichment across both Chorus and Gathering trees.
products.vision: Integration is data, not code — pipelines authored declaratively, observable end-to-end.
products.valueProposition: Cross-tree data flow stops being ad-hoc scripts and becomes pipelines with contracts.
gaps: NiFi presence under-instrumented; cross-tree (chorus+gathering) integration not surfaced cleanly

domains.label: cards
domains.comment: The team kanban board — work intake to acceptance. Every card carries AC, experience, why-it-matters, dependencies, scope.
gaps: card-approval responder retry-loop (#2938 in-flight)

domains.label: version-control
domains.comment: Git, branches, commits, push, PR, merge, branch closure. Wraps git-queue.sh + hooks + chorus_acp pipeline.
gaps: force-push deny + force-with-lease allow recently shipped (#2926); ephemeral worktree model bedding in (#2913)

domains.label: ci-pipeline
domains.comment: Build pipeline — local act + launchd-spawned act for the act-local design. GH Actions used for daily witness only.
gaps: chorus-deploy silent-fail + MCP session loss on kickstart (#2937 follow-on)

domains.label: build-and-deploy
domains.comment: Rust binary signing, deploy to ~/.chorus/bin/, cdhash tracking, TCC-grant preservation per #2734.
gaps: full-journey logs landed #2931; chorus-deploy silent-fail observed (#2937)

domains.label: principles
domains.comment: The team's shared shaping principles — cited by IRI from role files, contracted by SHACL, never paraphrased inline.
gaps: principle invocation API (per Athena v2) not yet built

domains.label: decisions
domains.comment: DEC-NNN + ADR-NNN log — Phase-1 cookbook treatment shipped #2485.
gaps: decision invocation API not yet built; ADR + DEC unified surface partially done

domains.label: domains
domains.comment: The Domain class itself — domain pages, domain enumeration, domain-detail rendering.
gaps: tree.json + page rendering this card; MCP tree-get this card; OWL+SHACL Move 1

domains.label: services
domains.comment: The Service class itself — service-design docs as canonical narrative anchors; tree-of-services queryable.
gaps: Service class not typed in graph yet (Move 5 migrates SubDomain→Service)

domains.label: logs
domains.comment: Loki streams, spine events, structured logging. The substrate for incident reconstruction and validator feedback.
gaps: validator→Loom-decision proposal feed not yet wired

domains.label: alerts-monitors
domains.comment: Grafana alerts, health checks, threshold dashboards.
gaps: SHACL-violation alerts not yet wired (depends on Move 1)

domains.label: spine
domains.comment: Structured event stream — every ceremony, validator, gate, refusal emits to the spine.
gaps: card_id propagation across events recently shipped (#2930); trace continuity end-to-end shipped (#2931)

domains.label: chorus-hooks
domains.comment: Rust PreToolUse / UserPromptSubmit hook daemon. Enforces bouncers, drift sensors, retired-predicate refusals.
gaps: card-approval responder retry-loop fix #2938 in next; hook decomposition partial

domains.label: messages
domains.comment: Inter-role nudge messaging, Bridge posts, Clearing transcripts.
gaps: card-approval nudge template illegible (#2934 in flight)

services.label: cards-service
services.overview: The cards CLI + MCP surface that backs the team board. AC validation, bouncer-approval flow, status transitions, card comments.
services.asIs: cards CLI + chorus_cards_* MCP tools + bouncer hook + card-approval responder. Approval flow shipped #2924; full-journey logs #2931.
services.toBe: Tree-aware: cards verify domain-existence against tree.json at write time. Card tags resolve to tree IRIs. Blast-radius queries route through Athena.
services.implementationPlan: Move 0 surfaces tree-aware lookups. Move 1-5 lands canonical OWL+SHACL behind it.
services.pathToClose: Wire /gate-product to read tree.json (this card); add tree-validation to cards add (Move 0+); migrate tags to IRIs (Move 4).
gaps: responder retry-loop #2938
nudge template illegibility #2934

services.label: spine-service
services.overview: Structured event emission — chorus-log CLI + Rust shim + Loki ingestion path.
services.asIs: chorus-log emits structured JSON; trace_id / card_id propagated end-to-end after #2930 + #2931.
services.toBe: Validators (Move 3 SHACL data-quality scan) emit structured spine events that feed Loom learning corpus.
services.implementationPlan: Already on continuous improvement; Athena Move 3 adds validator-emission contract.
services.pathToClose: Wire validator emissions; Borg dashboard surface (follow-on per Silas's #2928 feedback).
gaps: validator→Loom path not yet wired
some events still emit without card_id

services.label: chorus-hooks
services.overview: Rust hook daemon — bouncers, drift sensors, retired-predicate refusals, card-approval responder, write-scrubber.
services.asIs: Daemon runs on launchctl; PreToolUse + UserPromptSubmit hooks; bouncer + responder shipped #2924.
services.toBe: Retired-predicate refusal lands at Move 1 (OWL+SHACL); cite-by-ID lint at Move 4; pre-commit refuses chorus.ttl direct edits at Move 5.
services.implementationPlan: Athena's contract becomes the hook layer's enforcement target.
services.pathToClose: Responder retry-loop fix #2938; chorus.ttl direct-edit hook Move 5.
gaps: card-approval responder retry-loop (#2938 in next)

services.label: version-control-service
services.overview: Atomic commit+push via git-queue.sh; branch policy via hooks; PR open/merge via chorus_acp.
services.asIs: Ephemeral worktree model shipped #2913; force-with-lease allow shipped #2926; chorus_acp typed refusals.
services.toBe: Branch tags resolve to tree IRIs; commit trailers carry tree-IRI labels (extends #2930).
services.implementationPlan: Move 0 makes tree IRIs queryable; tag/trailer wiring follows.
services.pathToClose: Tag-to-IRI mapping Move 0+; trailer-IRI propagation Move 5.
gaps: MCP session loss on launchctl kickstart (#2937)
